steps.title: Define the hiking challenge
steps.content: A new audience needs the requirement for becoming a 50 Completer: reaching the highest points in all fifty US states. The best choice should define the achievement and connect it to the Highpointers Club.

steps.title: Reject partial introductions
steps.content: Choice A names two peaks but does not define the full challenge. Choice C reads like an invitation and omits the term's meaning. Choice D focuses on Min Jae Park's story instead of explaining the challenge. The answer is B.
